nasb.text: So she went down to the threshing floor and did according to all that her mother-in-law had commanded her.

esv.text: So she went down to the threshing floor and did just as her mother-in-law had commanded her.

cnv.text: 於是，她下到禾場去，照著婆婆吩咐的一切去作。

ccb.text: 于是，路得就到麦场去，照她婆婆吩咐的去做。

csbs.text: 于是路得下到打谷场，照着她婆婆所吩咐她的一切做了。
